---
title: BetaCo's water usage reduction claims are unverified
entity: companies/betaco
category: environmental-impact
verdict: unverified
confidence: low
as_of: 2026-04-01
sources:
  - 2025/betaco-press-release
---

BetaCo claims to have reduced water usage at its data centers by 40% in 2025, but no independent measurements or third-party audits have been published. The only source for this claim is a company press release that provides no methodology or baseline data. Without independent verification, this claim cannot be assessed.
